name: Shopify
description: Shopify is a leading e-commerce platform providing a REST Admin API to manage online stores. Agents can programmatically manage products, orders, customers, inventory, and fulfillments across Shopify storefronts.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products from the Shopify store. Supports filtering by collection, product type, vendor, status, and creation date.

capabilities.name: create_product
capabilities.description: Create a new product in the Shopify store with title, description, variants, pricing, images, and inventory details.

capabilities.name: list_orders
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders from the Shopify store. Supports filtering by status, financial status, fulfillment status, and date ranges.

capabilities.name: get_order
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full details of a specific order including line items, shipping address, payment information, and fulfillment status.

capabilities.name: list_customers
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers from the Shopify store. Supports searching by name or email and filtering by creation date.

capabilities.name: create_fulfillment
capabilities.description: Create a fulfillment for an order to mark items as shipped. Includes tracking number, tracking URL, and carrier information.

capabilities.name: manage_inventory
capabilities.description: Adjust or set inventory levels for a product variant at a specific location. Used for stock management and inventory synchronization.
